title: Schema-Comparison Conformance Manifest
description: JSON Schema describing the comparison corpus manifest: the index of fixture files with their mode, direction, and expected verdict. Harnesses iterate the manifest, never the directory.

conventionVersion.description: Fixture-format version. Every fixture file's 'version' field carries the same value.

profile.description: The comparison profile the corpus is authored against (the schema-comparison profile's identifier).

path.description: Fixture file path relative to the comparison corpus root, in one of the four categories: profile/ (the profile boundary: fail-closed keywords, annotations, extensions, boolean false), structural/ (normalization equivalence and document-level structure: pairing, removal, verdict collapse), subsumption/ (directional input/output rules), suppression/ (situations where the profile deliberately reports no finding).

mode.description: Comparison mode; must equal the fixture file's mode.

direction.description: Which operation schema slot the fixture compares.

verdict.description: The collapsed summary verdict; must equal the fixture's expected.summary.verdict.

findings.description: Informative labels for the deciding rule families behind a non-compatible verdict (empty for compatible fixtures). Harnesses assert verdicts, not findings; the labels exist for corpus navigation and coverage accounting.
